title: dryopteris propinqua
intro: Dryopteris propinqua is a species of fern known as the New Zealand scaly male fern, native to New Zealand and Lord Howe Island. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris propinqua typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water or making a decoction, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to support overall health.
